valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 19 Apr 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 20 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: High Irish Sea 1029 expected north Iceland 1038 by midday tomorrow

Viking.text:
Wind
In southwest, northwesterly 3 to 5, becoming variable 2 to 4, then southeasterly 4 to 6. In northeast, variable 2 to 4, becoming southeasterly 3 to 5 for a time, then northwesterly 3 to 5 later.
Sea state
In southwest, moderate, occasionally slight. in northeast, moderate.
Weather
In southwest, rain. In northeast, rain, fog patches.
Visibility
In southwest, moderate or good. In northeast, moderate or good, occasionally very poor.
